name: akshaya-dairy-management-system
description: Akshaya Dairy - Run backend, admin panel and driver/center frontend together

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,admin,driver -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:admin" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend-admin && npm run build --prefix frontend
